modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: ColdFusion app errors and missing options in Scantron Checkin

full_description_text:  
ColdFusion apps are giving errors. Scantron Form not accepting some email addresses.  
I copied two RC residents, but it auto fills “East River” every time.  
Options in the list are missing or shouldn't be there.
short_description: ColdFusion app errors and missing options in Scantron Checkin
description:
ColdFusion apps are giving errors. Scantron Form not accepting some email addresses.  
I copied two RC residents, but it auto fills “East River” every time.  
Options in the list are missing or shouldn't be there.
